themes.label: Fear/Anxiety
themes.summary: This chapter deals with fear, dread, anxiety, alarm, or the call not to be afraid. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Word-study detail reinforces "מַחֲרִֽיד׃: and none made them afraid - to shudder with terror; hence, to fear; also to haste...".

themes.label: Creation

themes.label: Provision
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes God’s supplying care, nourishment, sufficiency, or generous provision. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 2 verses. Commentary leans on "The lion did tear in pieces enough for his whelps ( aryeh toreph bedi gorotav , אַרְיֵה טֹרֵף...". Word-study detail reinforces "טֹרֵף֙: did tear in pieces - to pluck off or pull to pieces; causatively to supply with food...".
